text.title: openai-assistants Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for openai-assistants as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Querying a File Search-enabled assistant immediately after uploading a file.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: File processing is asynchronous. Querying before file.status == "completed" returns results that do not include the uploaded content, producing silently incomplete answers.
